sessionPresentation.liveSessionOff: Live session is off. Open Share when you want to sync this timer across devices.
sessionPresentation.liveConnectingDescription: Starting live synchronization and preparing separate join and manage links.
sessionPresentation.liveConnectedDescription: This timer is synchronized through a live session.
sessionPresentation.liveReconnectingDescription: Trying to restore live synchronization. Local changes will sync again after reconnect.
sessionPresentation.liveConflictDescription: Review is needed before live synchronization can continue.
sessionPresentation.liveOfflineDescription: Disconnected from the live session. Local changes stay usable and will sync again after reconnect.
sessionPresentation.waitingForControllerDescription: The last manage client left this live session. You can keep waiting for a manager to return or switch this joined client to a private local timer.
sessionPresentation.syncAcrossDevices: Synchronize this timer across multiple devices.
sessionPresentation.preparingSeparateLinks: Preparing separate join and manage links
sessionPresentation.switchingToControlLink: Switching this timer to its manage link
sessionPresentation.shareViewerOrControl: Share a join link for audience screens or a manage link for full timer and settings access.
sessionPresentation.tryingToReconnect: Trying to reconnect to the live session.
sessionPresentation.conflictHandlingReviewDialog: Conflict handling continues in the review dialog
sessionPresentation.viewerAndControlStayAvailable: Join and manage links stay available
sessionPresentation.reviewBeforeSyncContinues: Review the session before synchronization continues.
sessionPresentation.localShareDescription: Open this timer setup independently. No live synchronization. Changes are independent after opening.

dialogs.connectFailedDetail: Could not connect to the remote relay. Check the relay URL and try again.
dialogs.closedBeforeReadyDetail: Remote relay connection closed before the session was ready.
dialogs.retryingAutomaticallyDetail: Could not connect to the remote relay. Retrying automatically.
dialogs.malformedLinkDetail: Live session link is malformed. Check the URL and try again.
dialogs.endLiveSessionDescription: This will disconnect {count} {participants} from the live session immediately.
dialogs.endLiveSessionTitle: End the live session for everyone?
dialogs.leaveControlClientDescription: This manage client still has {count} {participants} connected. Leaving now can interrupt the active workshop.
dialogs.waitingForSharedTimerState: Waiting for the shared timer state.
dialogs.syncConflictDescription: The live session changed while this client was recovering. Choose whether to keep the fresh server state, push this client's local timer state, or leave the live session and continue locally.
dialogs.invalidSessionDescription: This live session link is no longer valid. You can retry the connection or continue with the best available local timer state.
dialogs.recoveryDescription: The live session could not recover cleanly. Retry the connection or continue with the best available local timer state.
dialogs.syncConflictTitle: Live session state changed during recovery.
dialogs.recoveryTitle: Live session recovery needs your decision.
dialogs.connectionProblem: Live session link has a connection problem. {detail}

floatingTimer.requiresSecureContext: Floating Timer requires a secure context. Use https:// or open the app on localhost.
floatingTimer.requiresChromium: Floating Timer currently requires a Chromium-based desktop browser such as Chrome or Edge.
floatingTimer.requiresVersion: Floating Timer requires Chrome or Edge 116 or newer. Current Chromium version: {version}.
floatingTimer.missingDocumentPiP: This Chromium build does not currently expose Document Picture-in-Picture.

page.otherClientsBeforeUnload: Other live-session clients are still connected to this manager.
page.liveSessionEndedDescription: This live session ended. The timer is available locally again and can be shared again at any time.
